rows.label: tev022901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Neither Sakuraba nor Grenada GG
make any Doll equipment that
really speaks to me, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022901_MSG0002
rows.name:
But now there's that new MEREDES
& Co. joint that opened after
we landed here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Their stuff is way cooler than
anything coming out of stodgy old
Sakuraba or Grenada. I really dig it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022901_MSG0004
rows.name:
I've managed to save up a
nice chunk of change after
doing business with Shiraton.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022901_MSG0005
rows.name:
I've been thinking of making a new
Gold Courage Doll tricked out
entirely in MEREDES & Co. parts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022901_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm just getting one person
after another asking me to
dispose of their dangerous waste.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022901_MSG0011
rows.name:
To put it in Zaruboggan terms, folks just
bring us voltant and piles of money.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022901_MSG0012
rows.name:
Then I give the junk to Shiraton
and he cleans it up. I'm making
money hand over fist![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Heh heh heh. And it's all thanks to
you turning a blind eye to that little
kerfuffle with me and Shiraton.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev022901_MSG0014
rows.name:
One of these days, we gotta rent out a restaurant
and have a little drinking party to celebrate
the bright future of humans and Zaruboggan![ST:wait ]
